title: rosa × polliniana var. variegata
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. variegata, also known as Rosa polyantha variegata, is a type of fragrant, pink-flowering rose that is commonly grown in gardens for its ornamental value. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rosa × polliniana var. variegata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to promote overall well-being.
